title: Add Image & Video Management to Next.js
description: Complete media pipeline: Cloudinary CDN for image/video delivery and transformations, UploadThing for the browser upload widget, S3 for durable raw-file backup, and Prisma to track media metadata.

steps.description: Set up Cloudinary for image/video upload, auto-optimization, and CDN delivery
Add UploadThing for a type-safe browser upload widget integrated with Next.js
Configure S3 (or Cloudflare R2) for durable raw-file storage and backup
Store media metadata (public ID, URL, size, mime type) in the database
Monitor upload errors and failed transformations in production
Deploy the media-enabled app to production
